statement.en: Deep learning image analysis of donor red blood cells to predict deformability and transfusion efficacy
statement.summary: The full abstract for this thesis is available in the body of the thesis, and will be available when the embargo expires.

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: The submission is a thesis with embargoed abstract content (full scientific claims unavailable for evaluation). The title proposes a concrete application (deep learning for RBC deformability prediction), but without access to methodology, results, or validation data, truth-status cannot be established. Classification as FLOWING reflects provisional status pending full disclosure and peer review.

ramanujanFormula.interpretation: 細胞の形態と柔軟性の対話が、時間とともに消えてゆく生命力を映す。

visualGlyph.interpretation: 光学的な詞読と流体力学的な変形が、同じ細胞の中で静かに踊っている。
